pods.name: Humyn Labs — Audio
pods.note: Multi-pipeline: validation, annotation, collection, account infra & data ops

items.feature: POC on emotions and acoustic tagging auto QC
Creating Feedback Loop for a self learning tool using the changes made by annotators on the pre-annotation
Building a recursive learning platform for low resource languages
Enable new recorder for single speaker audios
Validation test on Stark Samples for unitelligible cases
International Language support(Arabic is a must)
Enable single speaker for Annotation Tool
Handle the exception for the withdrawal stake
Annotation pipeline for automatic submissions based on project configs
Annotation and QC tool enhancement: Task distribution % per cc(Vendor)
New post-processing service for data delivery(cross account/ cross org/ copy of data to client bucket)
Click reduction on the quest journey - App & Task 2 and Task 1 in Quest
Collect Earings BE change to block rewards collection if phone number is not present
Annotation and QC: International Language support(Arabic is a must)
Social connect changes - remove phone number pop-up

devsecEpics.name: Endpoint Security Rollout Program
devsecEpics.desc: Deploy SentinelOne to 120 endpoints including pilot and full rollout.

devsecEpics.name: Cloud CNAPP & Workload Protection
devsecEpics.desc: Implement CNAPP and deploy agents to 143 workloads for enhanced security.

devsecEpics.name: Splunk Deployment & Log Onboarding
devsecEpics.desc: Procure and deploy Splunk with prioritized log ingestion for security monitoring.

devsecEpics.name: MDM Deployment & Compliance Enforcement
devsecEpics.desc: Deploy MDM across corporate devices with policy enforcement.

devsecEpics.name: Build Security Operations Team
devsecEpics.desc: Hire and onboard required security roles to establish security operations.

devsecEpics.name: Splunk Commercial & Legal Procurement
devsecEpics.desc: Complete commercial, financial, and legal procurement for Splunk.

devsecEpics.name: MDM Commercial & Licensing Procurement
devsecEpics.desc: Complete vendor selection and procurement cycle for MDM solution.

devsecEpics.name: Procurement Governance & Vendor Management
devsecEpics.desc: Ensure structured governance for all security tool purchases and renewals.

devsecEpics.name: Cloudflare WAF Deployment for Critical Domains
devsecEpics.desc: Implement and tune WAF protection for critical domains (humynlabs, kgen, kratos, exlr8).

devsecEpics.name: Remove Non-Critical Apps from Public Exposure
devsecEpics.desc: Reduce external attack surface by removing non-critical apps from public exposure.

devsecEpics.name: Investigate Active Infections & Anomalies
devsecEpics.desc: Perform deep threat investigation across multi-cloud environment (AWS, GCP, Cloudflare).

devsecEpics.name: Kubernetes Security Posture Review
devsecEpics.desc: Perform comprehensive KSPM review for existing GCP GKE and new AWS clusters.

devsecEpics.name: Post-Migration Security Review of New EKS Cluster
devsecEpics.desc: Perform security validation and hardening of new AWS EKS cluster post-migration.

devsecEpics.name: Design Kubernetes Cluster Segregation Strategy
devsecEpics.desc: Design architecture for segregating workloads into multiple clusters to reduce blast radius.
